scriptName: VS Code Folder + Background Context Menu Repair
description: Re-registers VS Code right-click entries for folders AND empty-space (background) and removes only the file-target leaf, then restarts Explorer.

messages.scriptDisabled: Folder + background repair is disabled in config.
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.removingTarget: Removing context menu entry on target '{target}': {path}
messages.restartingExplorer: Restarting explorer.exe so context menu refreshes...
messages.unknownEdition: Edition '{name}' not found in config.editions -- skipping
messages.completedWithWarnings: Folder + background repair completed with warnings -- review log above.
messages.preCheckHeader: Pre-check: inspecting current registry state (no writes).
messages.preCheckDryRunDone: Dry-run complete -- no changes applied. Re-run without 'dry-run' / 'precheck' to apply.
